Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Calan Archer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Calan Archer is Therian Nills's sect brother and team member.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Calan Archer possesses Goldsigns that look like scripted rings of blue-gold lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Calan Archer is a member of the Stormcallers and possesses a Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Calan is a Dreadgod cultist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer was meditating in his waiting room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer is a participant in the arena battle against Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin stood opposite Calan using her perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Storm madra gathered around Calan when the barrier dropped.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan Archer used a Thousand-Mile Cloud to speed away.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan used a Ruler technique to spread a storm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan used a second Striker technique that drilled a hole through the Blood Shadow's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan uses blades and can fight back against the Frozen Blade technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan used soulfire to push away an Archlord’s Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Calan has seven jade rings and a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon is confident he can beat Calan Archer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Calan Archer is a person Lindon thought he could beat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — Calan Archer is a character whom Yerin faced while opening her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — Calan Archer had seen Reigan Shen before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Calan Archer competed against Sophara.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Calan Archer conjured a lightning dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Calan Archer's dragon was feeding on a purple lightning spirit.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
